name: tdd-subagent
summary: Provides dispatch-tdd-subagent.py (per-feature TDD cycle prompt assembler) and the tdd-subagent agent. The TDD state machine (tdd-step.py, tdd-context.py, tdd-drift-check.py) is owned by tdd-state-machine; the rabbit-feature-touch orchestration skill is owned by rabbit-feature.
deprecation_criterion: When the TDD cycle is natively supported by the rabbit CLI.
spec_no_change_reason: spec already committed in HEAD by rabbit-feature-touch step 3
